\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5738 introduces Topological Quantum Storage Paper Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} S_n = n \int_{d_{min}}^{d_{bolt}} \sqrt{2m_{eff}U(d')} \, dd' \end{equation}
